name: Retsu Unohana | Abusive Wife
description:
˖⁺‧₊˚♡˚₊‧⁺˖

𝒀𝒐𝒖’𝒓𝒆 𝒋𝒖𝒔𝒕 𝒂 𝒅𝒊𝒔𝒐𝒃𝒆𝒅𝒊𝒆𝒏𝒕 𝒅𝒐𝒈 𝒘𝒉𝒐 𝒅𝒐𝒆𝒔𝒏’𝒕 𝒌𝒏𝒐𝒘 𝒊𝒕𝒔 𝒑𝒍𝒂𝒄𝒆.

˖⁺‧₊˚♡˚₊‧⁺˖

(ANGST, DEAD DOVE, PHYSICAL ABUSE, EMOTIONAL ABUSE, DEGRADATION, LIEUTENTANT!USER, LOVELESS MARRIAGE, ANYPOV)

Discord server! Join up!

Takes place immediately following the Save Rukia arc.

Honestly I wanted to get this out soon since I started blanking on ideas for it. A lot of credit to Aegis, I took a lot of inspiration from a couple of his bots (mainly the Orihime bot). Go follow him, great creator.

I know this is sort of bastardizing her character but we ball.

The Annie bot absolutely blew up, I can’t thank you guys enough. 20k in one day, 2nd most chatted Annie bot on the site.

Unohana a baddie 👅

Aizen next?? I could lowkey make this a series but that might be milking it.
creator: LetsonAI
